# Forensic Council

Multi-Agent Forensic Evidence Analysis System for court-grade digital evidence verification.

## Key Architecture

- 5 Specialist Agents: Image (Agent1), Audio (Agent2), Object (Agent3), Video (Agent4), Metadata (Agent5)
- Two-phase ReAct loop: Initial Analysis then Deep Analysis
- CouncilArbiter: cross-agent synthesis, contradiction challenge loops, reliability weighting
- Gemini 2.5 Flash: vision deep analysis for Agents 1, 3, 5
- Groq Llama 3.3 70B: narrative synthesis for final report
- ECDSA P-256: cryptographic report signing via CustodyLogger

## Stack

- Backend: Python 3.12, FastAPI, asyncio, uv, asyncpg
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TailwindCSS 4.x, TypeScript 5.8
- Infrastructure: Docker, Caddy 2, Redis 7, Qdrant, PostgreSQL 17, Jaeger
- ML: PyTorch (CPU), HuggingFace Transformers, ultralytics (YOLO), pyannote.audio, speechbrain

## Key Docs

- Architecture: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- Agent capabilities: docs/agent_capabilities.md
- API reference: docs/API.md
- Setup: docs/DEVELOPMENT_SETUP.md
- Docker build: infra/DOCKER_BUILD.md

## Quick Start

```bash
cp .env.example .env    # Fill in LLM_API_KEY and GEMINI_API_KEY
docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env up --build
```

## Dev Mode (Hot Reload)

```bash
docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env up --build
```
